title: Control of data transfer between processing nodes
abstract: A data processing system comprising a plurality of processing nodes, each comprising at least one memory configured to store an array of data items, wherein each of the plurality of processing nodes is configured to execute compute instructions during a compute phase and following a precompiled synchronisation barrier, enter at least one exchange phase. During the at least one exchange phase, a series of collective operations are carried out. Each processing node is configured to perform a reduce scatter collective in at least one first dimension. Using the results of the reduce scatter collective, each processing node performs an allreduce in a second dimension. The processing nodes then perform an all-gather collective in the at least one first dimension using the results of the allreduce.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A data processing system comprising a plurality of first processing nodes, each of the plurality of first processing nodes comprising at least one memory configured to store an array of data items, wherein each of the plurality of first processing nodes belongs to at least two different sets of processing nodes, wherein at least one processor of each of the plurality of first processing nodes is configured to execute compute instructions during a compute phase and following a precompiled synchronisation barrier, enter at least one exchange phase, wherein the at least one processor of each of the plurality of first processing nodes is configured to, during the at least one exchange phase: take part in one or more reduce scatter collectives using the respective array of data items to obtain a reduced subset of an array of data items, wherein each of the one or more reduce scatter collectives is performed between processing nodes of a different one of the respective at least two different sets of processing nodes; subsequently, exchange the respective reduced subset of the array of data items using an all-reduce collective with processing nodes of a further of the at least two different sets of processing nodes to which the respective processing node belongs to obtain a further reduced subset of the array of data items; and subsequently, take part in one or more all-gather collectives using the further reduced subset of the array of data items to obtain a reduced array of data items, wherein each of the one or more all-gather collectives is performed between processing nodes of one of the different ones of the respective at least two different sets of processing nodes. 2. A data processing system as claimed in claim 1, wherein each of the first processing nodes is part of one of a plurality of further sets of one or more processing nodes of the data processing system, wherein at least one processing node of each of the further set of processing nodes comprises at least one processor configured to, prior to the pre-compiled synchronisation barrier, generate the respective array of data items in dependence upon a different set of input data. 3. A data processing as claimed in claim 2 or claim 3, wherein each of the further sets of one or more processing nodes consists of a pair of processing nodes. 4. A data processing as claimed in claim 2 or claim 3, wherein each of the further sets of processing nodes comprises two or more processing nodes comprising one of the plurality of first processing nodes and at least one additional processing node. 5. A data processing system as claimed in claim 4, wherein at least one processor of at least one of the processing nodes in each further set of one or more of the processing nodes is configured to: perform the generating the respective array of data items; and transfer elements of the array of data items to another of the processing nodes in the respective further set of one or more of the processing nodes. 6. A data processing system as claimed in claim 5, wherein the steps of generating the respective array of data items, and transferring elements of the array of data items to another of the processing nodes is performed by at least one processor of the at least one additional processing node in each further set, wherein the another of the processing nodes to which the elements of the array of data items are transferred is the first processing node of the respective further set. 7. A data processing system as claimed in claim 2 or claim 6, wherein for each of the further sets of processing nodes: the generating the respective array of data items is performed as part of a stage of a multi stage process over a plurality of time periods; and the step of taking part in the one or more reduce-scatter collectives is performed following the completion of the multi-stage process, wherein, for each of the further sets of processing nodes, during each of some of the plurality of time periods: at least one processor of at least one of the processing nodes of the respective further set is configured to perform calculations for generating one or more elements of the respective array of data items; and at least one other of the processing nodes of the respective further set is configured to unload to storage one or more elements of the respective array of data items that was calculated during a preceding one of the plurality of time periods. 8. A data processing system as claimed in claim 7, wherein, for each of the further sets of processing nodes, the at least one other of the processing nodes comprises the first processing node of the respective further set. 9. A data processing system as claimed in claim 7 or claim 8, wherein, for each of some of the further sets of processing nodes, during each of at least some of the plurality of time periods: at least one processor of the respective first processing node of the further set of processing nodes is configured to generate one or more elements of the respective array of data items; and at least one processor of the respective at least one additional processing node is configured to unload one or more elements of the respective array of data items generated in a preceding of the time periods, wherein, for each of the some of the further sets of processing node, during each of at least others of the plurality of time periods: at least one processor of the respective at least one additional processing node of the further set of processing nodes is configured to generate one or more elements of the respective array of data items; and at least one processor of the respective further sets of processing node is configured to unload one or more elements of the respective array of data items generated in a preceding of the time periods. 10. A data processing system as claimed in any of claims 7 to 9, wherein each of the plurality of first processing nodes is configured to, prior to taking part in the one or more reduce-scatter collectives, load the elements of the respective array of data items that were unloaded to the storage by a processing node of the further set to which the respective first processing node belongs. 11. A data processing system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein each array of data items comprises at least one of: weight updates for a neural network; or weights for a neural network derived from weight updates for the neural network. 12. A data processing system as claimed in claim 2, wherein each array of data items comprises at least one of: weight updates for a neural network; or 

 weights for a neural network derived from weight updates for the neural network, wherein at least one processor of at least one processing node of each of the further sets of processing nodes is configured to generate the weight updates using a different set of training data. 13. A data processing system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the at least one processor of each of the first processing nodes in the data processing system is configured to: following a reduce-scatter collective of the all-reduce collective and prior to an all-gather collective of the all-reduce collective, perform operations on each stored element of the array of data items stored by the respective first processing node to modify data of the stored elements of the array of data items. 14. A data processing system as claimed in claim 13, wherein for each of the first processing nodes: each of the stored elements comprises weight updates for a neural network; and the operations to modify data comprise providing updated weights of the neural network using the weight updates, the modified data of the stored elements comprises the updated weights. 15. A data processing system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein for each of the first processing nodes: the respective at least two different sets of processing nodes consists of two sets of processing nodes; the one or more reduce-scatter collectives consist of a reduce scatter collective between processing nodes of a first of the respective two sets of processing nodes; the all-reduce collective is between processing nodes of a second of the respective two sets of processing nodes; and the one or more all-gather collectives consist of an all-gather collective between processing nodes of the first of the respective two sets of processing nodes. 16. A data processing system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein for each of the first processing nodes: the respective at least two different sets of processing nodes comprises more than two sets of processing nodes; 

 the one or more reduce-scatter collectives comprises a plurality of reduce scatter collectives; and the one or more all-gather collectives comprises a plurality of all-gather collectives. 17 A data processing system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein each of the plurality of first processing nodes comprises: at least one processing unit; and a gateway device connected to the at least one processing unit. 18. A data processing system as claimed in claim 17, wherein for each of the plurality of first processing nodes: the step of taking part in one or more reduce scatter collectives is performed by the respective at least one processing unit; the step of exchanging the respective reduced subset of the array of data items using an all- reduce collective is performed by the gateway device; and the step of taking part in one or more all-gather collectives is performed by the respective at least one processing unit. 19. A method implemented in a data processing system comprising a plurality of first processing nodes, each of the plurality of first processing nodes comprising at least one memory configured to store an array of data items, wherein each of the plurality of first processing nodes belongs to at least two different sets of processing nodes, wherein the method comprises, at each of the plurality of first processing nodes, executing compute instructions during a compute phase and following a precompiled synchronisation barrier, entering at least one exchange phase, wherein the method comprises, each of the first processing nodes, during the at least one exchange phase: taking part in one or more reduce scatter collectives using the respective array of data items to obtain a reduced subset of an array of data items, wherein each of the one or more reduce scatter collectives is performed between processing nodes of a different one of the respective at least two different sets of processing nodes; subsequently, exchanging the respective reduced subset of the array of data items using an all-reduce collective with processing nodes of a further of the at least two different sets of processing nodes to which the respective processing node belongs to obtain a further reduced subset of the array of data items; and 

 subsequently, taking part in one or more all-gather collectives using the further reduced subset of the array of data items to obtain a reduced array of data items, wherein each of the one or more all-gather collectives is performed between processing nodes of one of the different ones of the respective at least two different sets of processing nodes. 20. A non-transitory computer readable medium storing a computer program comprising sets of computer readable instructions, wherein when each of the sets of computer readable instructions is executed by at least one processor of a different one of a plurality of first processing nodes, the computer program causes a method according to claim 19 to be carried out.
